# Claude Sessions Log

Daily summaries of Claude Code sessions, learning resources, and AI development tips.

## Structure

```
sessions/          # Daily Claude Code session summaries (YYYY-MM-DD.md)
learning/          # Learning resources, tools, and tips
  tools/           # Tool reviews and tips
  skills/          # Skill breakdowns
  resources/       # Links and summaries
projects/          # Project registry and tracking
```

## Auto-generated
This repo is automatically maintained by a bridge bot that:
1. Summarizes Claude Code sessions every 6 hours
2. Tracks learning resources and tool discoveries
3. Maintains a project registry

## Sources
- [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code) sessions
- [OpenClaw](https://openclaw.dev) workflows
- AI Journal digests
